case_title: JASON CABOT VS. LISA QUIGLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CABOT, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT QUIGLEY, LISA UDR, INC. UDR DEVELOPERS. INC. UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC DBA 388 BEALE DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-18-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-14-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-26-2015
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-18-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-07-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JASON CABOT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-07-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-28-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2015 CONTINUED TO JUN-09-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 57152431) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CABOT, JASON
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 57152431) FILED BY PRO PER CABOT, JASON
FEE PD FOR EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO SERVE PLEADING (TRANSACTION ID # 57152431) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CABOT, JASON
ORDER EXTENDING TIME TO SERVE DENIED AS MOOT; EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR EXTENSION OF TIME TO SERVE PLEADING
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-09-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-09-2015 CONTINUED TO SEP-22-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-22-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JASON CABOT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-22-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-09-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-22-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-22-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-22-2015 CONTINUED TO MAR-22-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); FILE NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS; PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-22-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-22-2016 CONTINUED TO MAY-24-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); FILE NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS; PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. ***NOTICE: PLEASE FILE A NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS WITH THE COURT PRIOR TO THE NEXT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING DATE.*** THE MAR-22-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-24-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-24-2016 CONTINUED TO JUL-26-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); FILE NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS; PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-26-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JASON CABOT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-26-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-11-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-26-2016 CONTINUED TO OCT-25-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS; FILE A NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS. THE JUL-26-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-25-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B) AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-25-2016 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Continued To Oct-25-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff Jason Cabot is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Oct-25-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Continued To Jul-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by self-represented Plaintiff Jason Cabot. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JUL-26-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Continued To May-24-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by self-represented Plaintiff Jason Cabot. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to May-24-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Continued To Mar-22-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Self-represented Plaintiff Jason Cabot appearing on his behalf. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to MAR-22-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Plaintiff gives a new address to the clerk and will resubmit ex parte application to vacate sanctions. Plaintiff is informed that the address given to the clerk will be used only to mail the next notice/OSC. Court orders Plaintiff to file notice of change of address. JUDGE JOHN STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes/K. Tom.. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2015 Continued To Dec-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Dec-22-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura/KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2015 Continued To Sep-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Jason Cabot appearing Plaintiff Pro Per. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Sep-22-2015 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Continued To Jun-09-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Jun-09-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
